name: system-design-doc
description: Create standardized system design documents — supports Reverse Engineering from codebase, Import from implementation plan, Interactive Brainstorming with Mermaid diagrams, Architecture patterns (Microservices, Event-driven, Clean Architecture, DDD), qa-ui-test v2.5 integration via Section 2.4 Acceptance Criteria + Section 2.5 Use Cases (flat AC-NNN/UC-NNN IDs), /sync-with-qa-tracker bidirectional sync, /validate-integration covering 4 plugins with AC coverage + release-ready flag, /help command with mode-based guide
